title: Des gens sans importance
writer: Serge Groussard, Henri Verneuil, François Boyer
actors: Jean Gabin, Françoise Arnoul, Pierre Mondy
plot: Mid-aged married truck driver falls in love with a young waitress he meets while making a break on a long trip. They try to make it work, but she can't get a decent job or place to stay in his town. Things get worse when the man g...
